content.prompt_es: Completa con el verbo adecuado: ([[please|por favor]])

blocks.title: Block 2: I Have to Do It!

content.prompt_es: Completa con 'has to' o '[[have to|tener que]]':
¿'[[Must|deber]]' es más fuerte que '[[have to|tener que]]'?

content.stimulus_en: ________ he [[have to|tener que]] water the plants?

content.prompt_es: ¿'Don't have to' significa que algo está prohibido? ([[clean|limpiar]])

content.transcript: Tom's sister has to water the plants. She does this every morning. Tom helps her sometimes. Their mother tells them to take care of the garden. The plants are in the backyard. They like to watch the plants grow.

content.prompt_es: ¿Quién tiene que regar las plantas? ([[sometimes|a veces]])
content.stimulus_en: Tom's sister has to water the plants. She does this every morning. Tom helps her sometimes. Their mother tells them to take care of the [[garden|jardín]]. The plants are in the backyard. They like to watch the plants grow.
